source.body_text_sample:
ABOUT US NEWS IMPACT AREAS PROJECTS TAKE ACTION DONATE 
Search
Search for:
Employment
Being a part of the CDF Canada team means:
A culture of wellness and balance

Our goal is to empower you with the resources and flexibility you need to enjoy a healthy, balanced life. Benefits play an important role in choosing an employer which is why we’re committed to making sure our benefits reflect the evolving needs of our people.

Career development

Your professional development is a partnership between yourself and your supervisor/manager. And although our human resources team is here to support your growth, we believe your time here is an individual adventure. You steer your career development at CDF Canada, while your manager provides the coaching, tools and resources you need to thrive.

Mentoring & networking

Mentoring allows you to tap into the expertise of other professionals and to identify opportunities that can assist with your career development. It’s a great mechanism for ensuring growth and for making learning opportunities more accessible.

Diversity and inclusion

Inclusivity is at the heart of what we do! At CDF Canada, we recognize the immense value that different life experiences and perspectives bring to our organization. As a result, we intentionally seek people from diverse backgrounds and empower them to inspire our teams to nurture new processes and ideas.

Global reach. Local impact.
